calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Franklin Bell appeared in court to make a statement. The status hearing has been taken off calendar because all receipts were filed. Mr. Bell claimed he do not know what he was signing. He wants to get a jury trial. Proceeding not reported. Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Dec-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Continued To Nov-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Patricia Fyfe appearing for trustee. Mary Gemma O'Keeffe appearing as Guardian Ad Litem for Franklin Bell. Franklin Bell is in Court. Franklin Bell and Alex Bell has refused to sign the receipts. The appeals period has not run. Mr. Bell does not want to waive his right to seek other relief. Court offers two options to Mr. Bell today. He can sign the release today and get his check or this matter can be contiued to 11/28 for hearing before Judge Dearman. Mr. Bell wants a hearing before Judge Dearman. Matter is continued to 11/28. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Mary Gemma O'Keeffe appearing as Guardian Ad Litem for Franklin Bell. Mr. Bell is in court. Patricia Fyfe appearing for trustee. Mr. Bell is objecting to the way the trust has been administer. He feels he has been treated unfairly. A ring and $126,000.00 cash are missing from the trust. Ms. Fyfe responded to the objections. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Continued To Sep-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Continued To Aug-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Continued To Aug-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Patricia Fyfe appearing for trustee. Kevin Mclean specially appearing for and with Franklin Bell. Court asks Mr. Mclean if he is appearing only today or if he is general counsel for Mr. Bell. Mr. Mclean informs the court that he is helping Mr. Bell today only. He is not going to be able to take this case. Court is appointing Mary Gemma O'Keeffe as guardian ad litem for Mr. Bell. She has accepted the appointment. Matter is continued to 8/15. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-14-2006 Continued To Jul-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Continued To Jun-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Franklin Bell appearing in court. Counsel for the trustee is not in court. Mr. Bell will file his petition today. Matter is continued to 6/14. Clerk to call counsel. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lois Baty.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Continued To Jun-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Patricia Fyfe appearing for trustee. Franlin Bell is also in court. Mr. Bell informed the court that he has won the case in Small claims against his former counsel. He has not been able to obtain new counsel. Court tells him that it is in his best interest to have counsel. The accounting that was filed by Ms. Fyfe in not in proper format. Court directs both parties to meet with probate examiner. Matter is continued to 6/7. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Continued To May-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES: PATRICIA FYFE, ATTORNEY FOR PETITIONER
NO APPEARENCE, IF ACCOUNTING IS FILED ON OR BEFORE 5/3/06.
JUDGE:J. DEARMAN, CLERK:L. DOTSON, RPTR. K. BESAMIN, CSR 11722

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-15-2006 Continued To Apr-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Patricia Fyfe appearing with and for trustee, Ruth McArthur. Michael Keck appearing with Franklin Bell. Substitution of Attorney has been signed. Mr. Keck is out. Mr. Bell has not filed any objection to the accounting. Matter is continued to 4/19 for further status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
